description_long: This is a rugged, open-top SUV with a military-inspired design, featuring a matte olive green exterior and robust, angular body panels. The vehicle has no roof or side windows, exposing a utilitarian interior with two rows of bucket seats upholstered in a dark material. The dashboard is simple, with a visible steering wheel and basic instrument cluster, while the rear cargo area contains a full-size spare tire mounted horizontally. The SUV rides on large, off-road tires with deep treads and black, multi-spoke rims, and the wheel arches are pronounced for added clearance. The front end is characterized by a flat hood, rectangular headlights, and a minimal grille, while the rear features dual round taillights and a sturdy bumper. This vehicle is designed for both urban and off-road environments, offering high ground clearance and a durable build.
description: A rugged, open-top olive green SUV with exposed interior, off-road tires, and a spare tire in the rear cargo area. It features angular bodywork, pronounced wheel arches, and utilitarian styling.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the flat hood, rectangular headlights, open cabin, and large off-road tires.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the exposed cargo area, spare tire, and simple dashboard with steering wheel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual round taillights, spare tire, and open rear seating area.
description_view_3: Front-right view emphasizing the open cabin, bucket seats, and angular fender design.
attribute_wheel_design: black multi-spoke rims with deep off-road tread tires
